sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Cloudflare 2025년 3분기 매출 31% 성장·RPO 43% 급등, GAAP 순손실 130만 달러로 거의 손익분기점에 도달

keyPoints.text: 3분기 총매출이 5억 6,200만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 31% 증가했습니다.
RPO가 전년 동기 대비 43% 성장하고, Current RPO는 30% 성장했습니다.
GAAP 순손실이 130만 달러로 전년 동기 1,530만 달러에서 크게 축소됐습니다.

businessChanges.text: 비교 불가한 속도로 기능을 출시하며 인터넷 미래 사업 모델을 구축하는 핵심 플레이어라고 경영진이 밝혔습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 비GAAP 영업이익은 8,590만 달러(매출의 15.3%)로 전년 동기 6,350만 달러(14.8%)에서 개선됐습니다.
비GAAP 순이익은 1억 260만 달러로 전년 동기 7,260만 달러에서 증가했습니다.
현금·현금성 자산 및 매도가능증권은 2025년 9월 30일 기준 40억 4,350만 달러였습니다.

watchItems.text: RPO 43% 성장이 향후 매출 가시성을 높이는 선행 지표인 만큼, 수주 잔고가 실제 매출 가속으로 전환되는지 주목됩니다.
GAAP 순손실이 130만 달러까지 축소돼 흑자 전환 임박 여부가 핵심 관전 포인트입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q325exhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Cloudflare Announces Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results • Third quarter revenue totaled $562.0 million, representing an increase of 31% year-over-year • GAAP loss from operations of $37.5 million, or 7% of total revenue, and non-GAAP income from operations of $85.9 million, or 15% of revenue • Delivered RPO year-over-year growth of 43% and Current RPO year-over-year growth of 30% San Francisco, CA, October 30, 2025 — Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET), the leading connectivity cloud company, today announced financial results for its third quarter ended September 30, 2025. “Our excellent third quarter results clearly demonstrate our increasing momentum, with revenue growth accelerating for the second consecutive quarter to 31 percent year-over-year. Great companies  Normalized numeric aliases: $562.0 million = 5억 6,200만 달러; $37.5 million = 3,750만 달러; $85.9 million = 8,590만 달러; $562.0 = 562.0달러; $37.5 = 37.5달러; $85.9 = 85.9달러; 31 percent = 31%.

& CEO of Cloudflare. "We're shipping capabilities at an unmatched pace. This dramatically increases the value we deliver, expands our reach, and builds the rails for the next decade of Internet growth. I’m proud of our work being a key player in fundamentally shaping the future business model of the Internet. And, we’re just getting started.” Third Quarter Fiscal 2025 Financial Highlights • Revenue : Total revenue of $562.0 million, representing an increase of 31% year-over-year. • Gross Profit : GAAP gross profit was $415.7 million, or 74.0% gross margin, compared to $334.1 million, or 77.7%, in the third quarter of 2024. Non-GAAP  Normalized numeric aliases: $562.0 million = 5억 6,200만 달러; $415.7 million = 4억 1,570만 달러; $334.1 million = 3억 3,410만 달러; $423.1 million = 4억 2,310만 달러; $339.1 million = 3억 3,910만 달러; $37.5 million = 3,750만 달러; $30.8 million = 3,080만 달러; $562.0 = 562.0달러; $334.1 = 334.1달러; $415.7 = 415.7달러; $423.1 = 423.1달러; $339.1 = 339.1달러; $37.5 = 37.5달러; $30.8 = 30.8달러.

of revenue, in the third quarter of 2024. Non-GAAP income from operations was $85.9 million, or 15.3% of revenue, compared to $63.5 million, or 14.8% of revenue, in the third quarter of 2024. • Net Income (Loss) : GAAP net loss was $1.3 million, compared to $15.3 million in the third quarter of 2024. GAAP net loss per basic and diluted share was $0.00, compared to $0.04 in the third quarter of 2024. Non-GAAP net income was $102.6 million, compared to $72.6 million in the third quarter of 2024. Non-GAAP net income per diluted share was $0.27, compared to $0.20 in the third quarter of 2024. • Cash Flow  Normalized numeric aliases: $85.9 million = 8,590만 달러; $63.5 million = 6,350만 달러; $1.3 million = 130만 달러; $15.3 million = 1,530만 달러; $102.6 million = 1억 260만 달러; $72.6 million = 7,260만 달러; $167.1 million = 1억 6,710만 달러; $104.7 million = 1억 470만 달러; $45.3 million = 4,530만 달러; $0.00 = 0.00달러; $0.20 = 0.20달러; $0.27 = 0.27달러; $167.1 = 167.1달러; $104.7 = 104.7달러; $75.0 = 75.0달러; $45.3 = 45.3달러.

securities were $4,043.5 million as of September 30, 2025. The section titled "Non-GAAP Financial Information" below describes our usage of non-GAAP financial measures. Reconciliations between historical GAAP and non-GAAP information are contained at the end of this press release following the accompanying financial data. Financial Outlook For the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025, we expect: • Total revenue of $588.5 to $589.5 million • Non-GAAP income from operations of $83.0 to $84.0 million • Non-GAAP net income per share of $0.27, utilizing weighted average common shares  Normalized numeric aliases: $4,043.5 million = 40억 4,350만 달러; $589.5 million = 5억 8,950만 달러; $84.0 million = 8,400만 달러; 377 million = 3억 7,700만 달러; $2,143.0 million = 21억 4,300만 달러; $298.0 million = 2억 9,800만 달러; $4,043.5 = 4,043.5달러; $588.5 = 588.5달러; $83.0 = 83.0달러; $297.0 = 297.0달러; 2,143 million = 21억 4,300만 달러; $298.0 = 298.0달러; $0.91 = 0.91달러; 4,043 million = 40억 4,300만 달러; 2,142 million = 21억 4,200만 달러.
